overview: BuyHub Mart is a sleek, AI-powered price comparison website for Indian shoppers. Users search for products and instantly see side-by-side prices from top platforms like Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, and Meesho. Only the admin controls affiliate links and product listings, ensuring full revenue control. The site features personalized recommendations, hot deal highlights, and a dedicated Compare page for premium deal discovery.
features: AI-smart product search with relevance ranking
Side-by-side price comparison table across Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Meesho, and more
Dedicated /compare page for premium deal discovery
Hot Deals carousel with animated deal badges
Best Deal badge on product cards showing lowest price and platform
Personalized recommendations based on browsing history
Compare Prices CTA on every product card
Admin click analytics per platform per product
